summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new Backup & Restore feature for Orbit360 Engine. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - backup export/restore buttons visible and functional on Settings page. No regression on existing APIs or PWA files.
passed_tests: GET /api/backup/export returns correct structure with backup_version, exported_at, data, counts
GET /api/backup/export data contains content_items, content_packages, marketing_dna
GET /api/backup/export counts match actual data lengths
POST /api/backup/restore with empty data returns success
POST /api/backup/restore creates new content items that don't exist
UI: All DNA fields present (writing_style, tone, target_audience, brand_values, custom_instructions)
seed_data_creation: Test items created and cleaned up during restore tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backup/Restore feature fully implemented and tested. GET /api/backup/export returns all DB content as JSON with backup_version 1.0. POST /api/backup/restore accepts backup data and skips items that already exist (by id). Settings page has backup section with export (green) and restore buttons. No authentication required.
